# Corben's Own Sources, Papers, and Local Projects

This appendix is generated from `sources/source_inventory.json` and current chapter assignments in `book_structure.json`.

This is an independent top-level appendix for Corben's own papers, Corben-supplied source material, recovered project history, and local project references. It is not a combined "sources used" appendix, and it is not split into internal Corben/external parts. It contains only material on the Corben/local-project side of the corpus: Corben-authored papers, Corben-supplied source material, local-project source routes, recovered architecture notes, implementation references, variants, and public-safe source records that are not marked as third-party external literature.

It is not a claim that every source has been ingested, summarized, citation-normalized, or independently verified. Source-derived claims should not be promoted until the relevant source has a source note and Appendix C has been updated.

External and third-party sources are not the second half of Appendix G. They live in their own top-level appendix: [Appendix H, External Sources by Other Authors](H_external_sources.qmd).

## Source Ownership Boundary

This page is the Corben-side source appendix. It should be read as Appendix G only; the external-source appendix is Appendix H.

## Appendix Identity

| Field | Boundary |
|---|---|
| This appendix contains | Corben-authored papers, Corben-supplied materials, recovered project records, and local project source records. |
| This appendix excludes | Third-party papers, documentation, outside projects, and other non-Corben references; those live in the separate Appendix H. |

## Appendix Scope

| Field | Boundary |
|---|---|
| Appendix identity | Appendix G: Corben's own sources, papers, and local projects |
| Ownership rule | If Corben wrote it, supplied it, recovered it from his project history, or built it in a local project, it belongs here; if another author, organization, or outside project produced it, it belongs in Appendix H. |
| Contains | Source material supplied by Corben, including authored ASI Stack papers, local-project source routes, implementation references, recovered notes, variants, and public-safe corpus records. |
| Excludes | Third-party literature records marked `external_literature`; those belong in Appendix H. |
| Evidence effect | Organizes Corben-side architecture material; it does not promote any claim unless the source note, Appendix C mapping, and evidence transition support that move. |

## Reader Source List

The live book keeps this corpus as a wide audit table. The reader edition uses source cards so long source IDs, chapter assignments, and citation status notes wrap cleanly in PDF and e-reader formats.

### Verified Intent-to-Execution Architecture

- Source ID: `viea`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `whole_stack_execution_spine`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1SDu8MWw4dOpFqwLqA8vpE1rV98O2_GeJgVlgb6R9GsM)
- Current use: asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); human-intent-as-a-formal-input (Human Intent as a Formal Input); stable-capability-fields (Stable Capability Fields); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); intent-to-execution-contracts (Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work); planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); labor-os-and-typed-jobs (Labor OS and Typed Jobs); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Stable Capability Fields

- Source ID: `scf`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `governance_recursive_self_improvement`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1hQ9LqEgpeHo2SAntUVk15Eegms_xRVfOhtndVM5TDS4)
- Current use: asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); stable-capability-fields (Stable Capability Fields); capability-replacement-and-rollback (Capability Replacement and Rollback); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); replaceable-cognitive-substrates-beyond-transformer-monoculture (Replaceable Cognitive Substrates: Beyond Transformer Monoculture); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### PlanForge

- Source ID: `planforge`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `planning_control`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12mSs7u6JxrtVQ_GbNpBY7lXCA5uyE62Lx91gi_VRjgo)
- Current use: human-intent-as-a-formal-input (Human Intent as a Formal Input); planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### PlanForge: A Compiler Architecture for AI Task Orchestration

- Source ID: `planforge_compiler_arch`
- Priority: `must_use_variant`
- Layer: `planning_control`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ute1JJLsMfQyRFgKKveSr8U-w_MM-hk5fGxm7Vp5z1o)
- Current use: planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Cognitive Compilation

- Source ID: `cognitive_compilation`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `planning_semantic_ir`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1spEWiRnk1NUFuK3BLh3X80r_Up_SyebO1c3JSEzTUis)
- Current use: human-intent-as-a-formal-input (Human Intent as a Formal Input); intent-to-execution-contracts (Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work); planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Talos Protocol

- Source ID: `talos`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `labor_execution_os`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1IRHwojXgcGx4INJsVx8uMYu4vJGl6H5O9w_l_01VcyU)
- Current use: asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); human-intent-as-a-formal-input (Human Intent as a Formal Input); stable-capability-fields (Stable Capability Fields); capability-replacement-and-rollback (Capability Replacement and Rollback); security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); intent-to-execution-contracts (Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review); labor-os-and-typed-jobs (Labor OS and Typed Jobs); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); inter-stack-protocols-identity-and-economic-exchange (Inter-Stack Protocols, Identity, and Economic Exchange); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Talos_Protocol_v1.0.md

- Source ID: `talos_md`
- Priority: `must_use_variant`
- Layer: `labor_execution_os`
- Link: [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1vCXRSKiE2C5ngmo7KHhPBBTtzVvr2ki-)
- Current use: labor-os-and-typed-jobs (Labor OS and Typed Jobs)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Virtual_Context_Memory_v1

- Source ID: `vcm_public`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `memory_context`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1fid_RDNJcY3gM5WfqTpz5RABpzzoehWU4QKGhurRyJM)
- Current use: failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint); verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy (Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy); inter-stack-protocols-identity-and-economic-exchange (Inter-Stack Protocols, Identity, and Economic Exchange); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts (Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Virtual_Context_Memory_v1.0_Editable

- Source ID: `vcm_editable`
- Priority: `must_use_variant`
- Layer: `memory_context`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1D5RifUx-1Eq_WluCrS9FUcf3qt4X7I6_n21YD2ffB0w)
- Current use: failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint); verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy (Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Proof of Belief / The Spinoza Architecture

- Source ID: `spinoza`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `reasoning_epistemology`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Y90DBgxsOJImMXi4aOrwxtbyjlkVZpCzu1YJy_SFatk)
- Current use: failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility); moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict (Moral Uncertainty, Value Conflict, and Contestable Governance); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy (Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Spinoza Composer / Spinoza Trinity

- Source ID: `spinoza_composer`
- Priority: `supporting`
- Layer: `reasoning_media_compliance`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1pWHPNCFL5dnphZxKUhj5c_yk3juskWQZPTzPjxE7nEE)
- Current use: artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### MoECOT-Agent Architecture Whitepaper

- Source ID: `moecot`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `implementation_reference`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Lw5qjIFLK1gxGxqYw3_zLneFF5JT_Ihn5VI1CntjtvM)
- Current use: asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); stable-capability-fields (Stable Capability Fields); capability-replacement-and-rollback (Capability Replacement and Rollback); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); intent-to-execution-contracts (Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work); planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); labor-os-and-typed-jobs (Labor OS and Typed Jobs); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### moecot_agent_whitepaper.md

- Source ID: `moecot_md`
- Priority: `must_use_variant`
- Layer: `implementation_reference`
- Link: [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1F0KW0-TR54xKGeetIPkDTV1Tn5_9w3i0)
- Current use: routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Octopus Router Architecture

- Source ID: `octopus_router`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `routing_modular_intelligence`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Ew0fdnJf9crnGrQDckzNEc5fFniZviayqQfGIR3TBMY)
- Current use: routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Ratcheting Modular Intelligence

- Source ID: `rmi`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `capability_ratchet`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/16ULc3Y82TuqkFGBpjKyhrEVZYt9_Vlvatq2kiO-q1VI)
- Current use: the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); capability-replacement-and-rollback (Capability Replacement and Rollback); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); open-ended-improvement-engines (Open-Ended Improvement Engines); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); replaceable-cognitive-substrates-beyond-transformer-monoculture (Replaceable Cognitive Substrates: Beyond Transformer Monoculture); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); adversarial-evaluation-sandbagging-and-training-time-deception (Adversarial Evaluation, Sandbagging, and Training-Time Deception); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Cognitive Loop Closure

- Source ID: `cognitive_loop_closure`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `procedural_memory`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12yac3ZpHv3dRk2-0u627rn-gFkqGQWY4jsIJwAW9YeQ)
- Current use: capability-replacement-and-rollback (Capability Replacement and Rollback); open-ended-improvement-engines (Open-Ended Improvement Engines); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Benchmaxxing: The Performance Ratchet

- Source ID: `benchmaxxing`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `benchmarks_evidence`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1m1EycQk56VDh1Rg3IY8GYwkebIVn3bGAWIHs93a3628)
- Current use: evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); capability-replacement-and-rollback (Capability Replacement and Rollback); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); open-ended-improvement-engines (Open-Ended Improvement Engines); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); replaceable-cognitive-substrates-beyond-transformer-monoculture (Replaceable Cognitive Substrates: Beyond Transformer Monoculture); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); capability-thresholds-and-deployment-commitments (Capability Thresholds and Deployment Commitments); adversarial-evaluation-sandbagging-and-training-time-deception (Adversarial Evaluation, Sandbagging, and Training-Time Deception); safety-cases-and-structured-assurance (Safety Cases and Structured Assurance); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Compact Generative Systems

- Source ID: `cgs`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `compression_representation`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1y8IW-rnDSM8-q1KUnLfqKTGobwCoHoBwuMJ4-gCcw3M)
- Current use: the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression (RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Ratcheting Generative Systems

- Source ID: `rgs`
- Priority: `supporting`
- Layer: `compression_capability_growth`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jxbgwiBzgUgdTjpPiOkEQNZz2ehcDioTG-lUBV-f4FA)
- Current use: procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### RankFold + NeuralFold

- Source ID: `rankfold_neuralfold`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `compression_representation`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1-9wujZDobutPQbAml3H3QqYvdt9GIk55bxJiaPeSUhg)
- Current use: the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression (RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### rankFold compressor

- Source ID: `rankfold_compressor`
- Priority: `must_use_variant`
- Layer: `compression_representation`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/11jw0DAAuUvw75Q_1AiwTiUGcd-y_IywB9qdEka9_MfI)
- Current use: rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression (RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### BBVCA_v9_final_public_release

- Source ID: `bbvca_v9`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `compression_representation`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1dCcqTteePCyUb66H3qJ-50uYMNDdqHFG7-qQpHSvVaA)
- Current use: the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression (RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Big Bang Volumetric Compression Architecture

- Source ID: `bbvca_main`
- Priority: `must_use_variant`
- Layer: `compression_representation`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tlgJismt6JaYv_jaf2XbwCX7WEqj9FJ0WvEtbHYS_-E)
- Current use: compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### GenesisCode

- Source ID: `genesiscode`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `executable_specification`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1w4gKcF9a7oV6hsUECsWeEafblvc78ZusxaxdUTfLR2M)
- Current use: system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); intent-to-execution-contracts (Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work); cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review); labor-os-and-typed-jobs (Labor OS and Typed Jobs); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Field of God / Alignment Field family

- Source ID: `alignment_field`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `alignment_constitution`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1CCiBBlOEGB2huRDSwGm4P1JkVBkfmaUxJt9AwG23Kzw)
- Current use: constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility); moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict (Moral Uncertainty, Value Conflict, and Contestable Governance); security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### The Field of God

- Source ID: `field_of_god`
- Priority: `must_use_variant`
- Layer: `alignment_constitution`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1BDVLQqIeDm-PFijrg6oKaCbRtUyY--_waw88tnU9tj0)
- Current use: failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Field of God AI Constitution

- Source ID: `field_of_god_ai_constitution`
- Priority: `core_alignment_source`
- Layer: `constitutional_alignment_runtime_governance`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/personality-documents/field_of_god_ai_constitution_v1.md)
- Current use: constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility); moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict (Moral Uncertainty, Value Conflict, and Contestable Governance); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Ethica Mechanica

- Source ID: `ethica_mechanica`
- Priority: `must_use_variant`
- Layer: `alignment_constitution`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/15cN9D6s2bvAPoitp6Imh7deE3gCebqG4RbaSRGRd5GA)
- Current use: constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility); moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict (Moral Uncertainty, Value Conflict, and Contestable Governance)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### The Eternal Code / unified God, reality, conscious, alignment

- Source ID: `eternal_code`
- Priority: `must_use_variant`
- Layer: `alignment_constitution`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ZMqR7CMSnzignSbHdm38q9jSAXGMRsIoz3jOz3qmVrc)
- Current use: constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### The Coherence Exchange

- Source ID: `coherence_exchange`
- Priority: `strong_support`
- Layer: `epistemic_market_synthesis`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RUeBKp_UnRVIMc2oPBT2j3xm-HBa81Y4VqTckPhCeJc)
- Current use: evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment: Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility); moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict (Moral Uncertainty, Value Conflict, and Contestable Governance); security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Verification Bandwidth in Bounded Contexts

- Source ID: `verification_bandwidth`
- Priority: `strong_support`
- Layer: `context_verification_theory`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1T34n1Ya6_joaAD8ZxygOpiEuNzEVj3G8_nf0xZuFL2U)
- Current use: evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); scalable-oversight-and-adversarial-ai-control (Scalable Oversight and Adversarial AI Control); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy (Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); governed-deliberation-and-test-time-scaling (Governed Deliberation and Test-Time Scaling); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### BeastBrain Cognitive Architecture

- Source ID: `beastbrain`
- Priority: `supporting_lineage`
- Layer: `whole_stack_lineage`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1PVLtICJVZm36c6M2y9JkuMZF9nfu_6pyR1SXqFzknME)
- Current use: asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### BeastBrain Architecture: Timeless Edition

- Source ID: `beastbrain_timeless`
- Priority: `supporting_lineage`
- Layer: `whole_stack_lineage`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12g8s3R_v0mJ7GXaOoWeWkqHWBQWe_iGmcTmUwChZLwg)
- Current use: the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Aletheia Foundry

- Source ID: `aletheia`
- Priority: `supporting_lineage`
- Layer: `safe_general_intelligence_lineage`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1H6M_IPbuu86FOQurv2rLQ97EYQVdThZ2U7njl0DBpIE)
- Current use: asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Context Engineer / Manhattan Protocol

- Source ID: `context_engineer`
- Priority: `supporting_lineage`
- Layer: `memory_context_lineage`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xXP364s9IZ4DFmRHTmBELviRQkJcQ55McIUokioRFdo)
- Current use: security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Black Hole Context Manager

- Source ID: `black_hole_context_manager`
- Priority: `supporting_lineage`
- Layer: `memory_context_lineage`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/14KPQT5d86HaFZzQdUr_Sn5p7-8cscSqIZm5zxkijl-I)
- Current use: context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Ladon & The Manhattan Protocol

- Source ID: `ladon_manhattan`
- Priority: `supporting_lineage`
- Layer: `security_governance`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1uT9iQ7Jb2TsU9DletvtVeLEej63aIQl3WS3jTsMgtSM)
- Current use: system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict (Moral Uncertainty, Value Conflict, and Contestable Governance); stable-capability-fields (Stable Capability Fields); security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Unified Adaptive Tribunal

- Source ID: `uat`
- Priority: `supporting_lineage`
- Layer: `evaluation_refinement`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1R7wKo2qg5waosEa-SwC-JKF77qoDiiEp1Df4Gbap0VE)
- Current use: evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict (Moral Uncertainty, Value Conflict, and Contestable Governance); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### TreeLLM

- Source ID: `treellm`
- Priority: `supporting_lineage`
- Layer: `semantic_representation`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/17C98P4WhU4srqrT83xXpopRvwHO19zRFJ_ov0MWhgHE)
- Current use: cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR); verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy (Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Software Magic Grimoire

- Source ID: `software_magic_grimoire`
- Priority: `supporting_lineage`
- Layer: `command_contracts_promptcraft`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1UjGadqJ3ZiqfLgbac0APtV_OLnlSZAkIW0o0r37YdBo)
- Current use: human-intent-as-a-formal-input (Human Intent as a Formal Input); intent-to-execution-contracts (Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work); planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); labor-os-and-typed-jobs (Labor OS and Typed Jobs); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Road To AGI

- Source ID: `road_to_agi`
- Priority: `supporting_lineage`
- Layer: `strategic_roadmap`
- Link: [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1FfYjqa36tMQ4s4KLbPPnIOZNfQefuT7p)
- Current use: benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Simulation Scaling Law

- Source ID: `simulation_scaling`
- Priority: `optional_support`
- Layer: `compute_fidelity_constraints`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1rt0lnpwZ9X6M_ejLC7PYHQSXsvajYICGo4ETS-ndUFA)
- Current use: the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### TokenMana

- Source ID: `tokenmana`
- Priority: `optional_support`
- Layer: `resource_economics`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1dGOlGPZi6byTwRUbHQt40OSErBnQ4j6G_BZvA-oJRM8)
- Current use: planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); inter-stack-protocols-identity-and-economic-exchange (Inter-Stack Protocols, Identity, and Economic Exchange); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### CoilMoECOT Whitepaper v2.0

- Source ID: `coilmoecot`
- Priority: `optional_technical_appendix`
- Layer: `mathematical_search_substrate`
- Link: [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1iwhhRGr7vj_Sr4UwwM_yX_ESSyisoWur)
- Current use: mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Temporal Coil Research

- Source ID: `temporal_coil_research`
- Priority: `optional_technical_appendix`
- Layer: `mathematical_search_substrate`
- Link: [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1PSQsAwMurlVRdsM6r_zRd2MPLZYv0qXH)
- Current use: mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### BugBrain

- Source ID: `bugbrain`
- Priority: `optional_support`
- Layer: `edge_efficiency_lineage`
- Link: [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XR716XCo-WmvOpvGTGDmh9zbv44oiyjfcVDVQ1YibIc)
- Current use: compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression (RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Compiled Cognitive Architecture project

- Source ID: `cca_project`
- Priority: `implementation_reference`
- Layer: `compiled_cognitive_architecture`
- Link: local project reference (not publicly linked)
- Current use: system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); model-weight-custody-and-hardware-roots-of-trust (Model-Weight Custody and Hardware Roots of Trust); ai-supply-chain-integrity-and-lifecycle-provenance (AI Supply-Chain Integrity and Lifecycle Provenance); intent-to-execution-contracts (Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work); cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### MoECOT Manifest compiler-era project

- Source ID: `moecot_manifest_project`
- Priority: `implementation_reference`
- Layer: `compiler_first_ai_systems`
- Link: local project reference (not publicly linked)
- Current use: system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); ai-supply-chain-integrity-and-lifecycle-provenance (AI Supply-Chain Integrity and Lifecycle Provenance); intent-to-execution-contracts (Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work); cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### BeastBrain historical AI system project

- Source ID: `beastbrain_project`
- Priority: `implementation_reference`
- Layer: `durable_semantic_memory_and_system_architecture`
- Link: local project reference (not publicly linked)
- Current use: system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); intent-to-execution-contracts (Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### BugBrain bare-metal neuro-symbolic intelligence project

- Source ID: `bugbrain_project`
- Priority: `implementation_reference`
- Layer: `hardware_explicit_governed_cognition`
- Link: local project reference (not publicly linked)
- Current use: system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); intent-to-execution-contracts (Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Corben's Trainer epistemic training and evaluation control plane

- Source ID: `corbens_trainer_project`
- Priority: `implementation_reference`
- Layer: `epistemic_training_and_evaluation_control_plane`
- Link: local project reference (not publicly linked)
- Current use: system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); ai-supply-chain-integrity-and-lifecycle-provenance (AI Supply-Chain Integrity and Lifecycle Provenance); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Corben's Best Model Possible recurrent-model and mechanism laboratory

- Source ID: `corbens_best_model_possible_project`
- Priority: `implementation_reference`
- Layer: `recurrent_model_mechanisms_and_capability_evidence`
- Link: local project reference (not publicly linked)
- Current use: system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); intent-to-execution-contracts (Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work); cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Proof-Carrying Claims and Adversarial Review); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Project Theseus Whitepaper

- Source ID: `project_theseus_whitepaper`
- Priority: `implementation_reference`
- Layer: `report_first_rmi_prototype`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/docs/PROJECT_THESEUS_WHITEPAPER.md)
- Current use: procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference (Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Theseus Plan Compiler

- Source ID: `theseus_plan_compiler`
- Priority: `implementation_reference`
- Layer: `planning_control`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/docs/THESEUS_PLAN_COMPILER.md)
- Current use: integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference (Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Theseus Self-Evolution System

- Source ID: `theseus_self_evolution_system`
- Priority: `implementation_reference`
- Layer: `recursive_self_improvement_governance`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/docs/SELF_EVOLUTION_SYSTEM.md)
- Current use: recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference (Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Theseus Architecture Gate

- Source ID: `theseus_architecture_gate`
- Priority: `implementation_reference`
- Layer: `readiness_gate_governance`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE_GATE.md)
- Current use: recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); capability-thresholds-and-deployment-commitments (Capability Thresholds and Deployment Commitments); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference (Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Hive Operator OS and Work Board

- Source ID: `theseus_operator_os`
- Priority: `implementation_reference`
- Layer: `labor_os_operator_surface`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/docs/HIVE_OPERATOR_OS.md)
- Current use: runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference (Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Theseus Circle Calculus Transfer Lane

- Source ID: `theseus_circle_transfer`
- Priority: `implementation_reference`
- Layer: `proof_contract_transfer`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/docs/CIRCLE_CALCULUS_TRANSFER.md)
- Current use: mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts (Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts); coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers (CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference (Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Circle Calculus

- Source ID: `circle_calculus_core`
- Priority: `core_technical_source`
- Layer: `proof_carrying_mathematical_substrate`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus)
- Current use: mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts (Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Circle Calculus AI Contract Suite

- Source ID: `circle_ai_contract_suite`
- Priority: `core_technical_source`
- Layer: `proof_carrying_ai_contracts`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/docs/AI_CONTRACT_SUITE.md)
- Current use: circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts (Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts); coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts (Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts); coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers (CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Circle AI Architectures

- Source ID: `circle_ai_architectures`
- Priority: `core_technical_source`
- Layer: `cyclic_ai_architecture`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_AI_01_CIRCLE_AI_ARCHITECTURES.md)
- Current use: compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts (Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts); coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers (CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Coil Attention and Memory

- Source ID: `coil_attention_memory`
- Priority: `core_technical_source`
- Layer: `cyclic_attention_memory`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_AI_02_COIL_ATTENTION_AND_MEMORY.md)
- Current use: coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts (Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### CoilRA and MultiCoil RoPE

- Source ID: `coilra_multicoil_rope`
- Priority: `core_technical_source`
- Layer: `cyclic_mixers_position_encoding`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_AI_03_COILRA_AND_MULTICOIL_ROPE.md)
- Current use: compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers (CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Proof-Carrying RoPE Position Distinguishability

- Source ID: `rope_position_certifier`
- Priority: `core_technical_source`
- Layer: `proof_carrying_position_contract`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_AI_04_ROPE_POSITION_CERTIFIER.md)
- Current use: circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts (Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts); coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers (CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Proof-Carrying Circular Computation

- Source ID: `proof_carrying_circular_computation`
- Priority: `supporting_technical_source`
- Layer: `proof_carrying_compute_substrate`
- Link: [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_COMP_01_PROOF_CARRYING_CIRCULAR_COMPUTATION.md)
- Current use: mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts (Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Theseus Synthetic Data Curation

- Source ID: `theseus_synthetic_data_curation`
- Priority: `implementation_reference`
- Layer: `governed_synthetic_data_admission`
- Link: local project reference (not publicly linked)
- Current use: data-engines-continual-learning-and-unlearning (Data Engines, Continual Learning, and Unlearning)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Question-Compiled Semantic Addressing

- Source ID: `qcsa_whitepaper`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `semantic_addressing_control_plane`
- Link: local source reference (not publicly linked)
- Current use: cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); inter-stack-protocols-identity-and-economic-exchange (Inter-Stack Protocols, Identity, and Economic Exchange); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); data-engines-continual-learning-and-unlearning (Data Engines, Continual Learning, and Unlearning); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### The Reflexive Router: A Pre-Deliberative Architecture for Fast, Governed, Tool-Native Intelligence

- Source ID: `reflexive_router_whitepaper`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `pre_deliberative_reflexive_routing_control_plane`
- Link: local source reference (not publicly linked)
- Current use: stable-capability-fields (Stable Capability Fields); intent-to-execution-contracts (Command Contracts: From Intent to Executable Work); planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer: DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### KISS versus Irreducible Intelligence (author-supplied design conversation)

- Source ID: `corben_chatgpt_kiss_irreducible_intelligence_2026`
- Priority: `supporting`
- Layer: `author_intent_replaceable_cognitive_substrates`
- Link: [source](https://chatgpt.com/share/6a57604d-59b4-83ea-8da7-b9d3d52658f8)
- Current use: replaceable-cognitive-substrates-beyond-transformer-monoculture (Replaceable Cognitive Substrates: Beyond Transformer Monoculture)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### OneCell and Theseus Architecture Handoff (author-supplied design conversation)

- Source ID: `corben_chatgpt_onecell_theseus_2026`
- Priority: `supporting`
- Layer: `author_intent_onecell_and_architectural_rsi`
- Link: [source](https://chatgpt.com/share/6a57781e-17a4-83ea-aaae-fa263a9ac2fd)
- Current use: replaceable-cognitive-substrates-beyond-transformer-monoculture (Replaceable Cognitive Substrates: Beyond Transformer Monoculture)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

### Kernel English with Hierarchical, Interaction-Amortized Residuals: A Dual-Vocabulary Cognitive Compiler for Efficient Language-Model Reasoning

- Source ID: `kernel_english_residual_compiler`
- Priority: `must_use`
- Layer: `canonical_cognitive_compilation_and_hierarchical_residual_runtime`
- Link: local source reference (not publicly linked)
- Current use: security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR); virtual-context-abi (The Virtual Context ABI: Typed Pages, Cells, and Certificates); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint); verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy (Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); replaceable-cognitive-substrates-beyond-transformer-monoculture (Replaceable Cognitive Substrates: Beyond Transformer Monoculture); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture)
- Bibliographic status: source note available; citation not normalized

## Citation Policy

- Use stable source IDs for supplied corpus references until full citation metadata exists.
- Do not infer authors, dates, venues, versions, or publication status from titles alone.
- Do not cite a source as supporting a claim until its text has been ingested and a source note exists.
- Keep speculative or design-synthesis claims labeled as `argument` until source, prototype, or test evidence justifies promotion.
